title: Defend a policy proposal
subtitle: Support a proposal with limits.
overview: Support does not mean blind enthusiasm.
Mention benefits and conditions for success.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: it will not solve everything, but...

items.es: Apoyo esta propuesta porque podría mejorar la movilidad urbana.
items.en: I support this proposal because it could improve urban mobility.

items.es: También podría beneficiar a personas que no tienen coche.
items.en: It could also benefit people who do not have a car.

items.es: Para que tenga éxito, debe ir acompañada de más frecuencia.
items.en: For it to succeed, it must be accompanied by more frequency.

items.es: No resolverá todos los problemas de tráfico, pero sería un avance.
items.en: It will not solve all traffic problems, but it would be progress.

items.es: Me parece una inversión socialmente útil.
items.en: It seems like a socially useful investment to me.
